For the MVP I’m just going to log/metrics/span metadata these errors. Some will be classed as WARN and others ERROR. Which ones are which is shown below. Here is the complete list of error codes https://developers.facebook.com/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/support/error-codes

WARN: 1, 2, 4, 80007, 130429, 130472, 131000, 131016, 131026, 131048, 131049, 131050, 131052, 131056, 131057, 133004, 133008, 133009, 133015, 133016, 134101, 134102, 1752041, 2388103 and 2494100.
ERROR: 0, 3, 10, 33, 100, 190, 200-299, 368, 130497, 131005, 131008, 131009, 131021, 131031, 131037, 131042, 131045, 131047, 131051, 131053, 132000, 132001, 132005, 132007, 132012, 132015, 132016, 132068, 132069, 133000, 133005, 133006, 133010, 134011, 135000, 200006, 200007, 2388001, 2388012, 2388019, 2388040, 2388047, 2388072, 2388073, 2388091, 2388093, 2388103, 2388103, 2593079, 2593085, 2593107, 2593108, 131055, 134100 and 134101.
